summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEW Tie-Down Calculator features: 393.108 WLL Chart, Direct/Indirect infographic, and Photo upload capability. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly via Playwright.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for accessibility - minor a11y improvement needed

passed_tests: 393.108 WLL Chart collapsible section exists with toggle button (data-testid='toggle-wll-chart')
393.108 chart is collapsed by default
393.108 chart expands/collapses on click
393.108 chart has all 7 categorized tabs: Chain Grade 70, Grade 43, Grade 80, Grade 30, Webbing/Straps, Wire Rope (6x37), Steel Strapping
Clicking items in 393.108 chart adds tie-downs with correct WLL values
Math verification: 3/8" Gr70 from chart gives 9200 WLL (not 6600 like quick preset)
Math verification: 1/2" Gr80 from chart shows 16000 lbs WLL
Quick presets still work (4 common types + Custom)
Direct vs Indirect infographic SVGs visible below presets/chart with DIRECT 100% WLL and INDIRECT 50% WLL labels
Photos section exists in calculator with 'Add Photo' button (data-testid='add-photo-btn')
POST /api/tiedown-photos endpoint uploads photo and returns photo object with photo_id, storage_path, original_filename, content_type, uploaded_at
Non-image files rejected with 400 status
POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown saves assessment with photos array
Photos carry over when saving to inspection
POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown/{assessment_id}/photos adds photo to existing assessment
DELETE /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown/{assessment_id}/photos/{photo_id} removes photo
InspectionDetail shows tie-down assessments with compliance badge, cargo info, tie-down list
InspectionDetail shows 'Add photo' button on tie-down assessments
Export with Photos button visible on InspectionDetail
Inspection export includes tie-down assessment section
Export with include_photos=Y includes assessment photos HTML
action_items: Minor: Add DialogTitle and aria-describedby to Save to Inspection modal for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: WLL_CHART constant correctly implements 49 CFR 393.108 values - Grade 70 3/8" = 9200, Grade 80 1/2" = 16000
DirectIndirectGraphic component provides clear visual explanation with SVG diagrams
Photo upload flow properly handles file validation (image/* only, 10MB max)
Assessment photos are correctly stored and retrieved via object storage
seed_data_creation: Created tie-down assessment on inspection a4a7f51d-9145-41d9-a867-3f7c97393f10 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) 393.108 WLL Chart at /calculator with 7 category tabs and correct WLL values per CFR, 2) Direct/Indirect infographic SVGs showing 100%/50% WLL, 3) Photo upload in calculator (POST /api/tiedown-photos) and on assessments (POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown/{assessment_id}/photos). Key data-testids: toggle-wll-chart, chart-tab-*, chart-add-*, photos-section, add-photo-btn, tiedown-assessments-section, tiedown-assessment-*. Quick preset 3/8" Gr70 Chain = 6600 (assembly rating), Chart 3/8" Gr70 = 9200 (raw chain WLL per 393.108).
